scaled_oracle_cases.description: Replay the canonical main() seed flow for make_tmfa_problem with added big-M constraints.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that the function imposes big-M constraints linking each flux variable to its binary indicator.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: For each reaction i, constraints v_i <= upper_i * zi_i and v_i >= lower_i * zi_i must be present.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: A solution without big-M constraints would have fewer constraints in the problem object and missing inequalities.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
prob, v, zi, dgri, xij, compounds = make_tmfa_problem(model, solver)
print("Namespaces:", list(prob.namespaces.keys()))
print("Flux vars:", v.vars)
print("Binary vars:", zi.vars)
print("Gibbs vars:", dgri.vars)
print("Concentration vars:", xij.vars)
print("Compounds:", compounds)
result = {'prob': prob, 'v': v, 'zi': zi, 'dgri': dgri, 'xij': xij, 'compounds': compounds}
scaled_oracle_cases.assertion_code:
# Verify big-M constraints
constraints = prob.constraints
assert len(constraints) == 6, f"Expected 6 constraints total, got {len(constraints)}"
ineq_count = 0
for c in constraints:
    if hasattr(c, 'sense'):
        assert c.sense in ('<=', '>='), f"Unexpected sense: {c.sense}"
        assert 'flux' in c.lhs and 'zi' in c.rhs, f"Constraint should link flux and zi: {c.lhs} {c.sense} {c.rhs}"
        ineq_count += 1
assert ineq_count == 4, f"Expected 4 inequality constraints, got {ineq_count}"
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must prove that the big-M constraints are correctly added for each reaction.
